stories.name: Few Routes
Custom Routes
stories.snippet:
const CustomRoutes = () => <Navbar
    routes={[
      { href: "/", label: "Produto", active: true },
      { href: "/docs", label: "Documentação" },
      { href: "/blog", label: "Blog" },
      { href: "/contato", label: "Contato" },
    ]} />;
